title: Puss At Court
content:
"Pussy-cat, pussy-cat, where have you been?"
    "I've been to London to look at the Queen."
    "Pussy-cat, pussy-cat, what did you there?"
    "I caught a little mouse under the chair."
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Puss At Court"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
